repo.description: A best practice for tensorflow project template architecture.

terms.context_snippet: A simple and well designed structure is essential for any Deep Learning project, so after a lot of practice and contributing in tensorflow projects here's a tensorflow project template that combines **simplcity**, **best practice for folder structure** and **good OOP design**.
